In order to finish the report, Anna stayed late at the office. As well as her usual tasks, she reviewed the contracts in front of her. On the other hand, the new intern had left early due to a sudden headache. At the same time, the manager called from abroad and asked about the schedule. In fact, the project was already ahead of the plan. In addition, the clients had approved the design. According to the latest email, the next meeting would be short. As a result, Anna felt calm and, instead of worrying, finished her coffee.
